name: Cilantro, hot pepper and garlic vinegar
directions: Separate, slightly crush, peel and score the garlic.
Soak and rinse the cilantro, dry and coarsley chop.
Combine with vinegar in a clean, decorative bottle and tightly cork.
Let it age for 4 weeks before using.

name: BBQ Rub
directions: Mix all together.
Use as a dry rub before cooking ribs or chicken.

name: Cottage Cheese Dip
directions: Combine all and chill.

name: BBQ Rub
directions: Mix them all together and rub on whatever you are BBQing.

name: Italian Pasta Salad
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
Toss gently with wooden spoon.
Cover and chill one hour.
Before serving, add additional wheat germ on top if desired.

name: Mermaid Salad
directions: Combine crab flakes with vegetables.
Stir vinegar into mayo.
Add to crab mixture.
Chill.

name: Ginger Marinade
directions: Combine all ingredients and marinate.

similar.name: Cilantro, hot pepper and garlic vinegar

name: Spicy Coffee Mix
directions: Blend all ingredients in blender on high for 15 seconds.
Stir and blend for another 15 seconds.
Store in air tight container.
For one serving: stir 2 teaspoons of mix in 2/3 cup boiling water.

similar.name: Cilantro, hot pepper and garlic vinegar

name: Black Bean Gazpacho
directions: In a large mixing bowl combine tomatoes, juice, ham, beans, cucumber or squash, chopped pepper, green onions, and dressing.
Cover and chill for 2 to 24 hours.
If desired, serve with bottled hot pepper sauce.
Makes 4 main-dish servings.
*Note:If you're not so hot about hot and spicy food, you can use regular vegetable juice, or even the reduced-sodium version.
Make-Ahead Tip: Combine ingredients; cover and chill for 2 to 24 hours.

similar.name: Cilantro, hot pepper and garlic vinegar

name: Black Bean Salsa
directions: Drain and rinse both cans.  Place in bowl.
Next, add rest of ingredients, and mix throughly.
Serve room temperature.
Don't worry about keeping leftovers, the avocado gets mushy when stored overnight.

similar.name: Cilantro, hot pepper and garlic vinegar

name: Pickled  Garlic
directions: Place garlic into a small jar with tight fitting lid.
Add white vinegar and sugar to cover, adding 1/2 teaspoon of sugar for each 1/2 cup of vinegar.
Refrigerate for 1 month before using.
Keeps indefinitely.

similar.name: Cilantro, hot pepper and garlic vinegar

name: Horseradish Hair Treatment
directions: Mix both ingredients together to form a smooth paste.
Massage this mixture into your hair and scalp.
Wrap your hair in a plastic wrap or use a plastic shower cap.
Leave the conditioner on your hair for 15 minutes.
Shampoo your hair as usual.
Rinse well and dry with a clean towel.

name: No-Salt Steakhouse Spice Rub
directions: Mix together and rub into meat before cooking.
